Thank You for Your Time
ESOP Evaluation Update
Seller
{{sellerName}}
Company
{{companyName}}
Date

Reference
{{ref}}
§ 01Appreciation

Thank you, {{sellerName}}, for taking the time to share your story and the details of {{companyName}} with us. We understand that exploring the future of your business is a significant and personal process, and we appreciate the trust you placed in our conversation.

§ 02Our Assessment

After careful review of the information you shared, we have concluded that an ESOP transition may not be the strongest path for {{companyName}} at this time.

Key consideration: {{declineReason}}

This determination reflects our honest assessment of the current fit, not a judgment on the quality of your business. We owe you a candid answer rather than a process that may not serve your goals.

§ 03What This Means

This is not a permanent answer. Circumstances change — business performance, team depth, market conditions, and personal timelines all evolve. If any of the factors behind our assessment shift, we would welcome a future conversation about whether an ESOP might become a better fit.

§ 04Alternatives Worth Exploring

Depending on your goals, other transition paths may be worth exploring:

A.Private equity sale. A PE firm may offer a full or partial acquisition, often with an equity rollover that lets you participate in future upside.
B.Strategic acquisition. A competitor or adjacent business may value your company for synergies that a financial buyer would not.
C.Management buyout. If you have a capable leadership team, a structured MBO may be a viable path with the right financing.
D.Gradual transition. A phased ownership transfer over several years may give you time to build the infrastructure that a full ESOP would require.

We wish you the best as you evaluate your options. The right path is the one that serves your employees, your legacy, and your personal goals.

§ 05Open Door

If circumstances change or you have questions down the road, please do not hesitate to reach out. We are happy to revisit the conversation at any time.
